title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 327.635 - Laws not directive to state or political subdivision that they employ professional landscape architects
text:
327.635.  Laws not directive to state or political subdivision that they employ professional landscape architects. — Nothing contained in sections 327.600 to 327.635 shall be considered as a directive to any state department of administration or any political subdivision thereof to employ a professional landscape architect.
(L. 1989 H.B. 190, et al. § 18, A.L. 2014 S.B. 809)
